title: Life Series Armor
description: Armor textures from the Life Series by grian
body:
# Life Series Armor
This resource pack aims to replicate the armor textures seen in the [Life Series](https://www.youtube.com/results?search_query=Life+Series) by [Grian](https://www.youtube.com/@Grian).

## Credit 
All credit for the source goes to the members of The Life Series and Grian.
		
You are free to use this pack as you may so choose, however please do not re-upload direct copies of this pack. Thanks!
